How to read this: scroll to zoom, drag to pan, hover for values. Candles green=up/red=down. Bollinger bands = volatility envelope (price near upper=stretched high, near lower=stretched low). RSI >70 overbought / <30 oversold. MACD line crossing its signal = momentum shift; histogram = the gap. Stochastic >80 overbought / <20 oversold. Dashed S/R lines = nearest support/resistance. Context for timing — not a buy/sell trigger. Not financial advice.
